channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Overhanging thorny leaved tree fronds from 252, Bromley Rd, Shortlands extend about 0.7m hazardously into the faces of pedestrians on the narrow footway (itself about 1.5m wide) by the bus stop, 14th July
item.description:
Overhanging thorny leaved tree fronds from 252, Bromley Rd, Shortlands extend about 0.7m hazardously into the faces of pedestrians on the narrow footway (itself about 1.5m wide) by the bus stop. The branches look floppy but the thorns are about half an inch long, hard to see and very sharp. The floppy green fronds also obscure the last-moment view of the 227 bus from the bus stop to give an adequate and safe request for it to stop.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: P10 Foliage tree branches obstructing signal visibility, 14th July
item.description:
P10 Foliage tree branches obstructing signal visibility
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wren Close road sign missing, 14th July
item.description:
As above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 103, Star Lane, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London

item.title: Morley’s Customers, 14th July
item.description:
A host of customers to the newly opened Morley’s in Palmers Green - illegally blocking mandatory cycle lane & unlawfully blocking pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lanes, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Random metal post, 14th July

item.title: Meat and rotting food bags dumped encouraging rats, 14th July
item.description:
Someone has dumped bags of food attracting rodents and stinky, summer heat is encouraging swarms of flies

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victorian Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped household items, 14th July
item.description:
… including mattress, clothes airer This site might have already been reported without a picture but it is still there days later and needs to be removed. The camera on Blithdale Rd that was focused on the tree hotspot to the other side of Broderick Grove has been removed but dumping is now taking place in this new location.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brodrick Grove, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uneven pavement outside no. 81, 13th July
item.description:
Loose & unstable paving by the tree outside no. 81. Trip hazard.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albany Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging hedge, 13th July
item.description:
Due to the overhanging hedge it makes it harder to pass others and means less pavement for when walking in a group.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Witham Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhang hedge, 13th July
item.description:
Due to the overhanging hedges at 5&7 it makes it harder to pass others and means less pavement for when walking in a group. It takes up about 1/3 of the path

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Witham Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging hedge, 13th July
item.description:
Due to the overhanging hedges at 5&7 it makes it harder to pass others and means less pavement for when walking in a group. It takes up about 1/3 of the path

item.title: Large amount of domestic waste bags left on pavement, 13th July
item.description:
Numerous full bin bags that smell and attracted lots of flys

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London

item.title: Electric Screen Not Working, 13th July
item.description:
Screen is on, but frozen on same / incorrect display. Countdown not working
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 339, Amhurst Road, Hackney, Greater London

item.title: Hedge overgrown, 13th July
item.description:
The hedge outside number 34 is overgrown and there is not a lot of room between the hedge and the lamppost for people to get through

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Digby Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Community Safety Intervention: Improved Street Lighting, 13th July
item.description:
Existing street lighting doesn’t provide sufficient illumination to deter anti-social behaviour

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kenmure Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Filthy, greasy, stinky pavements, 13th July
item.description:
The pavements are absolutely filthy, greasy and stinky all along High St. Kensington and also Notting Hill Gate. Photo is outside of Knoops, as just one example. The problem is notable outside the establishments who dump their waste on the pavement for collection. This is not done carefully and so many leakages occur. Establishments should be made to keep these areas clean, especially during these long periods of dry weather.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 65, Kensington High Street, Kensington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light by the road sign is out, 13th July
item.description:
The light as per the photo is not working. It’s a high drug taking area so the more lighting the better!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mare Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pohole in tarmac. About 7cm, opposite Coop carpark entrance, 13th July
item.description:
Pothole, concerned it may be start of something bigger. Hole, but tarmac next to it is raised.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 273, Blackfen Road, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
